name: Oracle InterOffice: Helping IS Deploy Solutions to Business Partners and Customers Over the Internet
description: Frictionless Data Package archiving Aberdeen Group's December 1995 product profile of Oracle InterOffice (code-named Pegasus), a modular cross-platform messaging, document management, and workflow product. Contains structured entities, technologies, observations, and controlled-vocabulary codes extracted from the original study.

about.name: Oracle InterOffice
about.description: Modular cross-platform messaging, document management, workflow, and calendaring product from Oracle Corporation, designed for Internet-enabled business collaboration with partners and customers.
about.operatingSystem: Windows NT, Windows 95, Windows 3.1, Motif, Macintosh, ASCII Terminal, Web Browser

distribution.name: entities.csv
distribution.description: Organizations referenced in the study with 2026 status

distribution.name: technologies.csv
distribution.description: Technologies referenced in the study with lifecycle status

distribution.name: observations.csv
distribution.description: Structured analytical observations extracted from the study text

distribution.name: codes.csv
distribution.description: Controlled vocabulary codes for all coded fields
